qa_pair.question: Which tool should an agent call first to discover whether the selected backend supports SolidWorks drawings, assembly mates, or only headless B-Rep exchange?
Which read-only tool reports whether the SolidWorks COM connection or headless backend dependencies are healthy?
Which read-only document tool returns units, material, mass, volume, and configurations for the active or specified file?
Which tool reads file-level, configuration-level, or cut-list metadata for BOM workflows without modifying the model?
Which read-only tool returns mass, volume, center of mass, and inertia details for the active model?
Which read-only SolidWorks backend tool should an agent call to inspect the active part's feature tree, bodies, custom properties, material, units, and bounding box in one response?
Which tool should be used to read BOM rows from an assembly or drawing when the backend supports it?
Which grouped read-only tool should an agent use for geometry analysis, feature recognition, dimension planning, design rule checks, or DFM signals?
If an agent needs to list assembly components or run interference detection, which grouped workflow tool should it call?
For a read-only assembly workflow that needs the component hierarchy without changing mates or placements, which assembly_operation operation name should the agent choose?
For a read-only assembly workflow that checks whether components overlap, which assembly_operation operation name should the agent choose?
Which grouped workflow tool covers model views, projected views, dimensions, annotations, title blocks, and drawing BOM insertion?
When an agent needs to add a drawing view and the backend supports drawings, which drawing_operation operation name should it use?
When an agent needs to read or update drawing title block fields through the drawing workflow envelope, which drawing_operation operation name should it use?
Which grouped workflow tool should an agent use to activate a named view, hide a component, create a section view, zoom, or take a viewport screenshot?
Which appearance_operation operation name should an agent choose for a read-only viewport capture?
For a workflow-level file package that collects an assembly and related drawings, which import_export_operation operation name should the agent choose?
For exporting many CAD files to a neutral format in one workflow, which import_export_operation operation name should the agent choose?
Which optional workflow tool covers SolidWorks Routing tasks such as creating routes, inserting fittings, pipe specs, isometric drawings, and piping BOMs?
If the selected backend lacks a Phase 2 optional method such as drawing_operation or assembly_operation, what error code should the tool response return?
